# Assessment Overview

This overview lists supplementary assessment documents available for this report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md): High-level and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md): Declared dependency map grouped by functional category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md): API endpoints, communication patterns, and service contracts.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md): Database, entities, repositories, and data ownership boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md): Configuration sources, profiles, properties, and secrets inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md): Core business workflows, rules, and process sequence diagram.
